## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run types:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run build:ds` (if design system package is affected)

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked related issue(s) (for example: `Closes #123`)
- [ ] Added or updated docs where relevant
- [ ] Added screenshots/video for UI changes (or N/A)
- [ ] Noted changelog impact for user-facing package changes

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
